events.text: This isn't the best advice. We should always be cautious and remain aware of the potential for human error,[br5.968][br6.049]but the EHR should be considered a helpful tool.[br9.185][br9.704]Instead, we should remind Vic to double-check orders in the EHR,[br14.214][br14.295]especially if they seem like they could be risky for the client.[br17.605][br17.686]If need be, orders can always be confirmed with the provider.[br21.325]
